abilities.description: Bard attracts and collects Chimes, granting him XP, Mana, and out-of-combat Move Speed. Every collected Chime buffs Bard’s Meeps. Bard summons Meeps regularly, assisting with his basic attacks and dealing extra magic damage. When Bard has collected enough Chimes, his meeps will also deal damage in an area and slow enemies hit.
abilities.label: TRAVELER’S CALL
abilities.subtitle: passive

abilities.description: Bard fires a missile which will damage and slow the first enemy struck, and continue onward. If it strikes a wall, it will stun the initial target; if it strikes another enemy, it will stun them both.
abilities.label: COSMIC BINDING

abilities.description: Bard conjures a Health shrine at a target location, granting the first ally champion to enter Move Speed, AP, and Health. The shrine continues growing for a short while, powering up its healing value.
abilities.label: CARETAKER’S SHRINE

abilities.description: Bard opens a portal in nearby terrain. Ally and enemy champions alike can take a one-way trip through that terrain by moving into the portal.
abilities.label: MAGICAL JOURNEY

abilities.description: Bard sends spirit energy arcing to a location, putting all champions, minions, monsters, and turrets hit into stasis for a brief time, as well as stunning them. Enemies hit are revealed for the duration.
abilities.label: TEMPERED FATE
abilities.subtitle: ultimate
